serviceNotes.engine oil: M47 same engine family as E46 320d: Oil Service 10,000 km or 12 months per https://www.auto-abc.eu/BMW-3-serija/v2167-2001/service (Tier 2); BMW owner's manual E39 520d.
serviceNotes.air cleaner element: Changed from 30,000 km to 10,000 km per https://www.auto-abc.eu/BMW-3-serija/v2167-2001/service (M47 diesel air filter).
serviceNotes.fuel filter: Changed from 60,000 km to 20,000 km per https://www.auto-abc.eu/BMW-3-serija/v2167-2001/service (M47 diesel fuel filter).
serviceNotes.check front brake pads: Changed to 10,000 km to align with 10,000 km Oil Service (M47 EU table).
serviceNotes.check rear brake pads: Changed to 10,000 km to align with Oil Service.
serviceNotes.EGR / intake clean: Diesel EGR/intake soot; ~120,000 km when needed.

serviceSources.engine oil: https://www.auto-abc.eu/BMW-3-serija/v2167-2001/service — 10,000 km / 12 months (BMW 320d M47); E39 520d uses same M47; BMW owner's manual E39 520d
serviceSources.micro filter: BMW owner's manual E39 (EU) — microfilter at Inspection II, 30,000 km
serviceSources.brake fluid: BMW owner's manual E39 — brake fluid every 24 months (DOT 4 LV)
serviceSources.fuel filter: Changed from 60,000 km to 20,000 km per https://www.auto-abc.eu/BMW-3-serija/v2167-2001/service (M47 diesel fuel filter)
serviceSources.check front brake pads: BMW owner's manual E39 — brake inspection each Oil Service; 10,000 km matched to M47 oil interval
serviceSources.check rear brake pads: BMW owner's manual E39 — brake inspection each Oil Service; 10,000 km matched to M47 oil interval
serviceSources.vehicle check: BMW owner's manual E39 (EU) — Inspection II / vehicle check 60,000 km
serviceSources.automatic transmission fluid: Haynes BMW 5 Series E39 — ATF exchange REC
serviceSources.manual gearbox fluid: Haynes BMW 5 Series E39 — manual gearbox oil REC 100,000 km
serviceSources.coolant flush: BMW owner's manual E39 diesel — coolant per schedule; REC preventive 120,000 km
serviceSources.EGR / intake clean: Diesel workshop practice — EGR/intake cleaning; REC only
